summary: Final implementation plan v3 incorporating all discussion refinements: Error-First strict mode for ALL niches, analysis-focused main/sub classification covering all 5 Pacing Slots (not just combat), 2-tier filter system (Phase Plan + Validate), adapted promote conditions with battle-specific Turning Point test expansion, engagement severity classification, and detailed anti-patterns for each pacing slot. Includes complete component breakdown, error flow diagram, and execution checklist.
